title_en: Introduction to Healing Body and Soul
content_en:
A guide to well-being that integrates prophetic medicine (al-tibb al-nabawi) with principles of spiritual and physical health. The author draws from authentic prophetic traditions to present Islamic guidance on diet, hygiene, sleep, exercise, and emotional health — demonstrating that the Sunnah of the Prophet (peace be upon him) provides a comprehensive framework for wellness.

The book addresses how Islamic practices — from the five daily prayers and fasting to remembrance of Allah (dhikr) and Quranic recitation — contribute to physical and psychological health. It also covers prophetic guidance on specific foods, herbs, and remedies mentioned in the Sunnah.

Drawing on both classical Islamic medicine and modern health research, this work shows how following the Prophet's example is itself a prescription for a balanced and healthy life. It is an accessible guide for Muslim families seeking to align their lifestyle with authentic Islamic practice.
